CustomField.description: Current age of the contact. Calculated based on DOB.
CustomField.formula:
IF( ISBLANK( Date_of_Birth__c ),
Age__c,
FLOOR((TODAY() - Date_of_Birth__c ) / 365.25)
)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Current age of the contact. Calculated based on DOB.
CustomField.label: Contact Age
